text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, McQueen? You seem rather<n>perplexed. Is
something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well... There's this movie, "Shogun<n>vs. Pastry
Chef vs. Alien!"...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship invited me to go see it with<n>her, so we
were going to head to the<n>theater today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But  she canceled on me. She ran off<n>saying
"Sorry! Gotta go save the world!"<n>and left me with
both of the tickets...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Why, I'd love to go together<n>with you in
her place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umm... I'm delighted you feel that way,<n>but I can't
promise that this movie would<n>be something
you'd enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I love trying new things! Not to<n>mention... I
would be happy simply to<n>spend the day with
you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh... That is, only if I'm not imposing, of<n>course...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all. Actually... I feel I have<n>something
to learn from your spirit of<n>taking on new
experiences.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm not particularly interested in the film,<n>but if
it's to broaden our knowledge of<n>one another,
that's a different story. So,<n>let us make our way to
the theater.
